acceptance_targets: [chapter_14_f01] In the revised passage replacing snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:3-37, the reader gets all three of these by the end of the fourth paragraph: one concrete care-task beat, one concrete fact of Tammy's financial or domestic life, and one specific anomaly involving Carmen or the residents. If the chapter is still doing generalized 'fifteen years taught you' summary before the anomaly appears, this finding is not fixed.

[chapter_14_f02] In the revised passage replacing snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:87-111, a cold reader can answer from the page: why Tammy stayed tonight, why this line of sight matters, and why the TV room light is suspicious but not conclusive. If any of those answers still depends on outside context or pure luck, this finding is not fixed.

[chapter_14_f04] In the revised passages replacing snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:9-11, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:23-35, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:121-123, each paragraph's key inference is carried by a concrete facility, body, or money detail in the same sentence or the sentence immediately adjacent. If a sentence still reads like a portable maxim that could be moved into another POV without changing its diction, this finding is not fixed.

findings.acceptance_test: In the revised passage replacing snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:3-37, the reader gets all three of these by the end of the fourth paragraph: one concrete care-task beat, one concrete fact of Tammy's financial or domestic life, and one specific anomaly involving Carmen or the residents. If the chapter is still doing generalized 'fifteen years taught you' summary before the anomaly appears, this finding is not fixed.
findings.evidence: The chapter does not activate its actual surveillance engine until Tammy turns toward Carmen at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:37, after long repeated dossier material about the job, the divorce, and Lakeview's decline at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:5, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:23, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:27.
findings.problem: The opening spends too much page time re-establishing Tammy's burnout, low pay, and institutional cynicism before the chapter's real pressure starts. Because the same burdens are restated in several adjacent blocks, the chapter feels padded rather than inevitability-driven, and its state shift arrives late for a chapter whose engine is supposed to be surveillance.
findings.rewrite_direction: Compress the summary-heavy blocks beginning at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:5 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:23, and fold only the most necessary divorce/pay/history facts into active observation. Keep the resident-care specificity at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:3, but move Carmen's anomaly work from snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:37 up into the opening movement so Tammy's suspicion is in play before the chapter finishes a second pass through her biography and Lakeview's decay.

findings.acceptance_test: In the revised passage replacing snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:87-111, a cold reader can answer from the page: why Tammy stayed tonight, why this line of sight matters, and why the TV room light is suspicious but not conclusive. If any of those answers still depends on outside context or pure luck, this finding is not fixed.
findings.evidence: Tammy stays in the parking lot for vague loneliness and hesitation at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:89, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:97, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:101, then receives the chapter's proof beat when the TV room light comes on at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:103 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:105.
findings.problem: The surveillance turn depends on Tammy happening to linger in exactly the right place until a plot-useful light comes on, but the chapter does not give enough concrete causality for why she stays this night, why this is the first time she has tried it, or what makes the sightline uniquely hers. The result is locally repairable, but right now the discovery reads more like lucky access than earned investigation.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework the watch sequence beginning at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:87 and especially the beats at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:89, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:97, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:103 so Tammy has a concrete trigger for staying tonight: a noticed pattern, a specific car, a prior timing anomaly, or another present-tense reason stronger than generalized dread. Use the geometry note at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:105 to clarify why this window matters and why the sighting is suspicious without making it feel solved.

findings.acceptance_test: In the revised passages replacing snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:9-11, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:23-35, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:121-123, each paragraph's key inference is carried by a concrete facility, body, or money detail in the same sentence or the sentence immediately adjacent. If a sentence still reads like a portable maxim that could be moved into another POV without changing its diction, this finding is not fixed.
findings.evidence: Tammy's POV repeatedly turns into polished thematic summary instead of flat close-third observation at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:11, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:23, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:33, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:35, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:123.
findings.problem: The narration keeps drifting away from Tammy's established mode - practical, body-literate, skeptical, CNA-shaped - and into portable literary maxims. That weakens POV integrity. The chapter often sounds like an external essayist summarizing the novel's themes instead of Tammy's trained eye cataloguing what does not add up in terms she would naturally use.
findings.rewrite_direction: Recast the interpretive sentences in the blocks anchored at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:9, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:23, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:33, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_14.md:121 so Tammy's insight arrives through her own working lexicon: bodies, call bells, pad changes, wage math, room geometry, bad knees, supply habits, door patterns. Keep the intelligence, but root each interpretive turn in concrete facility, body, or money detail rather than detachable thesis language.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Preserve productive dialogue roughness; do not clean living speech into balanced thesis statements.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Prioritize structural and craft blockers first: causality, chapter architecture, stakes clarity, continuity logic, and all HIGH/CRITICAL defects.
revision_pass.label: HIGH/CRITICAL structural/craft fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: This is a dark comedy about elderly agency, institutional failure, and moral compromise in a setting most fiction treats as a punchline or a tragedy but never both. The risks the novel must take: render the comedy of octogenarians as pharmaceutical distributors without condescending to them or turning them into lovable rogues; make Carmen's escalating complicity fully legible without moralizing about it; show the bodily realities of aging — incontinence, tremor, cognitive decline, falls, the smell of a body that doesn't leave a building — with unsentimental specificity; render the economic desperation of both healthcare workers and uninsured buyers without turning either into social-issue abstractions; give the moral ambiguity of the ring genuine weight by refusing to resolve it into either 'they were wrong' or 'they were heroes.' The novel must trust readers to sit with complexity. When in doubt between too raw and too safe, choose raw. A nursing home that smells like potpourri is a nursing home written by someone who's never been in one.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: Euphemism for bodily functions, aging, economic shame, institutional dysfunction, or the realities of nursing home care is a craft failure. The novel's comedy and humanity depend on rendering what polite fiction glosses over: what it smells like to clean someone who can't clean themselves, what it costs to count coins for a bus fare, what oxycodone sells for per milligram on the secondary market, what a concussion looks like on an 88-year-old skull, what it sounds like when someone with Parkinson's tries to hold a coffee cup steady, what Burt's dementia actually looks like up close. If the prose flinches from these specifics, the novel loses its authority.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High — contractions are the default for all dialogue. Uncontracted forms appear only for emphasis, character-specific formality (Agnes's low contraction level), Carmen under extreme stress reverting to formal speech, or deliberate register choices. In a contemporary New Jersey nursing home, stiff diction is the anomaly, not the norm.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate high-intensity scenes with reflective interiority. Vary scene count: single-scene chapters for maximum compression, three-scene chapters for range. Comic chapters (3, 9) should feel structurally different from quiet character studies (7, 8, 12, 15), which should feel different from crisis chapters (11, 16, 17). Follow a confrontation with a reflection, an escalation with a domestic scene, a comic set piece with an elegiac one. If two consecutive chapters share the same rhythm, one needs redesigning.
prose_style_profile.diction: Grounded and specific. Drug names (oxycodone, alprazolam, hydroxychloroquine), nursing procedures (med pass, pill count, charting, fall assessment), body realities (incontinence, tremor, laceration, scalp bleed). No purple prose, no literary performance. The style should feel like someone who works with their hands is telling you the truth about what she saw.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: Close third person, varying by POV character. Carmen chapters are warm and sensory, anchored in the body and the immediate environment. Harry chapters are precise and calculating, with attention to numbers and angles. Agnes chapters are clinical and compressed. Lola chapters are winding and emotionally layered, with embedded memories. Earl chapters are spare and weighted, with silence doing as much work as language. Marcus chapters are kinetic, with physical movement and code-switching. Tammy chapters are flat and observational, her trained eye cataloguing what doesn't add up.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Varied by chapter and POV. Carmen chapters favor medium sentences with occasional long runs when she's anxious. Harry chapters are short and clipped. Comic set pieces (chapters 3 and 9) move between fast inventory and slow domestic beats. Quiet chapters (7, 12, 15) slow down and let space onto the page. No chapter should feel rhythmically identical to the one before it.
